name: Almonds

pros.title: fairly satiating for the portion
pros.explanation: Dense texture and fibre can help fullness.

pros.title: easy to use as a practical wholefood snack
pros.explanation: Convenient and shelf-stable enough to fit many routines.

pros.title: contains useful polyphenols
pros.explanation: Adds extra plant-compound value beyond the standard nutrient table.

cons.title: contains some anti-nutrients
cons.explanation: Phytates may reduce mineral absorption somewhat.

cons.title: easy to overeat calories quickly
cons.explanation: Energy density can add up fast in large handfuls.

cons.title: not suitable for everyone
cons.explanation: Tree nut allergy risk matters in practice.

sourceNotes: Sample data for FoodRanked test pack.
Values are approximate and should be replaced with canonical source data later.
